heading: Enlisted members: voluntary retirement for length of service
label: 20603 Enlisted members: voluntary retirement for length of service

children.heading: .—Twenty to Thirty Years
children.label: a .—Twenty to Thirty Years
children.text: Under regulations to be prescribed by the Secretary of the Air Force, an enlisted member of the Space Force who has at least 20, but less than 30, years of service computed under may, upon the member’s request, be retired.section 20604 of this title

children.heading: .—Thirty Years or More
children.label: b .—Thirty Years or More
children.text: An enlisted member of the Space Force who has at least 30 years of service computed under shall be retired upon the member’s request.section 20604 of this title
